components.name: accent-frame
components.description: Corner bracket accent frame for highlighting content

components.name: ascii-rain
components.description: Animated Matrix-style ASCII rain background

components.name: holographic-terrain
components.description: Three.js wireframe terrain animated with layered sine waves and a cursor-reactive Gaussian bump.

components.name: glyph-city
components.description: Animated glyph cityscape with neon buildings, antennas, blinking peak lights, and flying vehicles. Multiple variants

components.name: cyber-circuit
components.description: Static SVG circuit traces entering from the corners with glowing terminal nodes. Configurable colors, line weight, dot style, and glow intensity.

components.name: badge
components.description: Futuristic label badge with pill, rectangle, and corner-cut shapes

components.name: border-beam-corner-cut-card
components.description: Corner-cut card with animated conic-gradient beam border

components.name: notch-card
components.description: Futuristic card with customizable rectangular notch indentations on any sides, animated beam border, gradient border, hover effects, and full color control

components.name: corner-cut-button
components.description: A Button with clipped polygon corner with high customizability

components.name: neon-input
components.description: A highly customizable neon input text field with various styles

components.name: datalines-with-grid
components.description: Animated data lines and grid background

components.name: glitch-text
components.description: RGB-split CSS glitch text with multiple intensities

components.name: neon-glow
components.description: Highly customizable neon glow text with single color, multi-color gradients (linear, radial, conic), glow intensities, and animated effects

components.name: neon-glow-corner-cut-card
components.description: Corner-cut card with neon gradient glow on hover

components.name: navbar
components.description: All-in-one navbar: standard or dock variant, submenus, profile menu, transparent/glass/solid backgrounds, fixed/floating/sticky positioning

components.name: timeline
components.description: Futuristic neon timeline with multiple variants, dot shapes, line styles, and animate-in

components.name: footer
components.description: All-in-one footer: minimal, columns, centered, and mega variants with socials, newsletter, link groups, and glass/solid backgrounds

components.name: hexagons
components.description: Flat-top hexagon grid with customizable fill, border colors, hover highlight, ambient glow, and animated beam lines flowing along hex edges.

components.name: card-slider
components.description: A generic card / image / video slider with touch swipe, arrow navigation, progress indicator (bar, dots, or counter), responsive visible count, auto-play, and full color customization.

components.name: crosshair
components.description: Animated crosshair cursor with two counter-rotating partial rings and a center crosshair. Fully customizable colors, sizes, ring thickness, arc gap, rotation speed, and glow intensity.

components.name: outline-text
components.description: Outline-only text with customizable stroke color, fill, stroke width, per-letter proximity hover effect, color transitions, and neon glow.

components.name: pluviophile
components.description: Natural rain background with canvas-rendered falling streaks. Configurable angle, speed, color, density, and drop size.

components.name: neon-modal
components.description: Cyberpunk-styled modal dialog with corner cuts, neon glow, animated entry/exit, scrollable body, header/footer slots, and full color customization.

components.name: neon-line-chart
components.description: Recharts-powered line/area chart with neon glow strokes, gradient area fills, multi-series support, and a corner-cut tooltip.

components.name: neon-bar-chart
components.description: Recharts-powered bar chart with top-rounded neon bars, glow drop-shadow, multi-color mode, multi-series support, and horizontal layout.

components.name: neon-donut-chart
components.description: Recharts-powered donut/ring chart with per-segment neon glow, interactive center label, hover dimming, and auto color palette.

components.name: neon-sparkline
components.description: Inline mini sparkline for embedding in KPI cards and stat widgets. Neon glow stroke, gradient fill, and a minimal tooltip.

components.name: stat-card
components.description: Dashboard KPI metric card with neon corner accents, scan-line hover, large value display, trend arrow with color coding, and embedded NeonSparkline.

components.name: neon-table
components.description: Sortable, paginated data table with neon scan-line row hover, corner accent marks, animated sort indicators, custom cell renderers, striped rows, and cyberpunk pagination.

components.name: progress-bar
components.description: Horizontal neon progress bar with solid, segmented, striped, and pulse variants. Supports size presets, glow, label, and smooth fill transition.

components.name: circular-progress
components.description: SVG arc-based radial progress ring with neon glow filter, animated fill, tick mark, center value display, and sub-label.

components.name: neon-toggle
components.description: Accessible switch/toggle with neon-glowing track, animated thumb, spark particle burst on activation, size presets, and full color control.

components.name: neon-checkbox
components.description: Corner-cut cyberpunk checkbox with neon glow on check, animated SVG checkmark, indeterminate state, and accessible aria-checked.

components.name: neon-select
components.description: Accessible custom dropdown with keyboard navigation, controlled/uncontrolled modes, neon glow trigger, animated clip-path listbox, and disabled option support.
